channel.title: Amrita School of Computing on My_Website
channel.description: Recent content in Amrita School of Computing on My_Website

item.title: Besides the Backwaters
item.description: Besides the Backwaters Situated in the serene village of Vallikavu, our campus exudes a sense of warmth and tranquility, creating the perfect environment for intellectual growth and personal development. Our educational institution encompasses six prestigious schools and more than 20 research centres, catering to students passionate about various disciplines such as arts, business, humanities, natural sciences, and social sciences. With a sprawling 80-acre expanse of land, our campus provides ample space for learning, exploration, and recreation.

item.title: Amrita School of Computing
item.description: About School of Computing, Amritapuri Welcome to the School of Computing at the Amritapuri Campus! We are a leading center of learning computer science in South India, offering a wide range of undergraduate, graduate, and doctoral programs to over 1000 students. Our department is known for its excellence in education and research. We have experienced and highly qualified faculty members who are dedicated to providing our students with a high level of knowledge and skills in the field of computer science.

item.title: My College
item.description: Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham is a multi-disciplinary, research-intensive, private university, educating a vibrant student population of over 24,000 by 1700+ strong faculty. Accredited with the highest possible ‘A++’ grade by NAAC, Amrita offers more than 250 UG, PG, and Ph.D. programs in Engineering, Management, and Medical Sciences including Ayurveda, Life Sciences, Physical Sciences, Agriculture Sciences, Arts & Humanities, and Social & Behavioral Sciences. With its extensive network of eight campuses spread across Amaravati, Amritapuri, Bengaluru, Chennai, Coimbatore, Kochi, Mysuru, and NCR Delhi (Faridabad), Amrita University stands as one of India’s preeminent private educational institutions.

item.title: Mission
item.description: Mission Amma’s profound mission of providing education for life, and emphasis on compassion driven research, has shaped Amrita as a unique institution: Education for Life There are two types of education: education for living and education for life. Studying to become a professional is education for a living, while education for life requires an understanding of the essential human values. At Amrita, we believe that education should also impart a culture of the heart, based on enduring values and inner strength.
